info.name: APEXIQ — Complete E2E Flow (Institute → Teacher → Student → AI)
info.description:
Complete end-to-end test of the APEXIQ EdTech platform.

Covers the FULL lifecycle:
0. Health Checks
1. Super Admin creates Tenant (Institute)
2. Institute Admin logs in & sets up Content (Subject→Chapter→Topic→Questions)
3. Admin creates Teacher → Teacher logs in
4. Admin creates Batch (assigns teacher), Lecture & Mock Test
5. Student registers, onboards, joins batch
6. Student takes mock test
7. Teacher: Content Management (lectures, questions, chapters)
8. Teacher: Live Class flow (start→poll→end→attendance)
9. Teacher: Doubt Queue & Response
10. Teacher: Batch Management (roster, attendance, performance)
11. ALL 12 AI Services
12. Student engagement, doubts, study plans
13. Analytics
14. Notifications
15. Admin Dashboard

Pre-requisites:
- NestJS: cd apexiq-backend/apexiq && npm run start:dev (port 3000)
- Django AI: cd AI_Study && python manage.py runserver 8000
- PostgreSQL running
- Super Admin must be pre-seeded in DB with role='super_admin'

Run folders IN ORDER. All IDs auto-chain via test scripts.

item.name: STEP 1 — Super Admin: Create Tenant (Institute)
item.description: Super Admin logs in and creates a new tenant (coaching institute). This bootstraps the institute_admin user.

item.name: STEP 2 — Institute Admin: Login & Setup Content
item.description: Institute admin logs in and sets up: Subject → Chapter → Topic → Questions

body.raw:
{
  "topicId": "{{topicId}}",
  "content": "A Carnot engine operates between 500 K and 300 K. What is its efficiency?",
  "type": "mcq_single",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "source": "teacher",
  "marksCorrect": 4,
  "marksWrong": -1,
  "solutionText": "Efficiency = 1 - T_cold/T_hot = 1 - 300/500 = 0.4 = 40%",
  "tags": ["thermodynamics", "carnot", "efficiency"],
  "options": [
    { "optionLabel": "A", "content": "20%", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 0 },
    { "optionLabel": "B", "content": "40%", "isCorrect": true, "sortOrder": 1 },
    { "optionLabel": "C", "content": "60%", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 2 },
    { "optionLabel": "D", "content": "80%", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

{
  "topicId": "{{topicId}}",
  "content": "Which law of thermodynamics states that energy cannot be created or destroyed?",
  "type": "mcq_single",
  "difficulty": "easy",
  "source": "teacher",
  "marksCorrect": 4,
  "marksWrong": -1,
  "solutionText": "The First Law of Thermodynamics is the law of conservation of energy.",
  "tags": ["thermodynamics", "first-law"],
  "options": [
    { "optionLabel": "A", "content": "Zeroth Law", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 0 },
    { "optionLabel": "B", "content": "First Law", "isCorrect": true, "sortOrder": 1 },
    { "optionLabel": "C", "content": "Second Law", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 2 },
    { "optionLabel": "D", "content": "Third Law", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

{
  "topicId": "{{topicId}}",
  "content": "In an isothermal process, which quantity remains constant?",
  "type": "mcq_single",
  "difficulty": "easy",
  "source": "teacher",
  "marksCorrect": 4,
  "marksWrong": -1,
  "solutionText": "In an isothermal process, temperature remains constant.",
  "tags": ["thermodynamics", "isothermal"],
  "options": [
    { "optionLabel": "A", "content": "Pressure", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 0 },
    { "optionLabel": "B", "content": "Volume", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 1 },
    { "optionLabel": "C", "content": "Temperature", "isCorrect": true, "sortOrder": 2 },
    { "optionLabel": "D", "content": "Entropy", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

item.name: STEP 3 — Admin: Create Teacher & Teacher Login
item.description: Institute Admin creates a teacher account. Teacher logs in via OTP (or password). This is the NEW teacher onboarding flow.

item.name: STEP 4 — Admin: Create Batch (with Teacher), Lecture & Mock Test
item.description: Admin creates a batch assigned to the teacher, adds a lecture, creates a mock test.

item.name: 4.1 Create Batch — JEE 2027 Batch A (with Teacher)

body.raw:
{
  "batchId": "{{batchId}}",
  "topicId": "{{topicId}}",
  "title": "Thermodynamics — Part 1: Carnot Engine",
  "description": "Deep dive into Carnot Engine, efficiency and applications",
  "type": "recorded",
  "videoUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/videos/thermo-part1.mp4",
  "durationMinutes": 45
}

item.name: STEP 5 — Student: Register, Onboard & Join Batch
item.description: Student registers via OTP, completes onboarding, joins batch via invite token.

item.name: STEP 6 — Student: Take Mock Test
item.description: Student starts test session → answers 3 questions → submits → views result.

item.name: STEP 7 — Teacher: Content Management
item.description: Teacher creates chapters, topics, questions, lectures — all teacher-accessible content endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "topicId": "{{teacherTopicId}}",
  "content": "In Young's double slit experiment, what happens when slit separation is halved?",
  "type": "mcq_single",
  "difficulty": "medium",
  "source": "teacher",
  "marksCorrect": 4,
  "marksWrong": -1,
  "solutionText": "Fringe width β = λD/d. When d is halved, β doubles.",
  "tags": ["optics", "youngs-experiment"],
  "options": [
    { "optionLabel": "A", "content": "Fringe width doubles", "isCorrect": true, "sortOrder": 0 },
    { "optionLabel": "B", "content": "Fringe width halves", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 1 },
    { "optionLabel": "C", "content": "No change", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 2 },
    { "optionLabel": "D", "content": "Fringes disappear", "isCorrect": false, "sortOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

{
  "batchId": "{{batchId}}",
  "topicId": "{{teacherTopicId}}",
  "title": "Wave Optics — Live Doubt Session",
  "description": "Interactive doubt clearing session on diffraction and interference",
  "type": "live",
  "scheduledAt": "2026-04-15T10:00:00Z",
  "liveMeetingUrl": "https://meet.apexiq.com/live/wave-optics-1"
}

item.name: STEP 8 — Teacher: Live Class Flow
item.description: Teacher starts a live class, creates a poll, closes poll, ends class, views attendance.

item.name: STEP 9 — Teacher: Doubt Queue & Response
item.description: Teacher views escalated doubt queue, responds to doubts, lists all doubts.

item.name: 9.1 Student — Create a Doubt (to generate queue)
9.2 Student — Mark Doubt NOT helpful (escalates to teacher)
STEP 10 — Teacher: Batch Management
item.description: Teacher views own batches, roster, attendance, and performance for assigned batches.

item.name: STEP 11 — Teacher: AI Services (Teacher-accessible)
item.description: Teacher tests AI endpoints accessible to their role: grading, engagement, STT notes, feedback.

item.name: STEP 12 — Student: ALL 12 AI Services
item.description: Student tests all 12 AI services via /api/v1/ai/* endpoints.

item.name: STEP 13 — Analytics & Notifications
item.description: Student analytics, admin notifications, admin dashboard.

item.name: STEP 14 — Admin Dashboard & Tenant Stats
item.description: Admin views batch management, super admin views platform stats.
